app.name: PACO Peptide
app.tagline: Your copilot on your GLP-1 journey
app.description: Track your doses, your weight, and how you feel. Get clear answers, in Spanish, without bullshit.

landing.hero_title: The companion that was missing on your GLP-1 journey
landing.hero_sub: Built for people taking Ozempic, Wegovy, Mounjaro, Zepbound, or compounded versions. Your personal log, your AI coach, all in Spanish.
landing.features_title: Everything you need, nothing you don't
landing.feature_log_desc: One tap to log doses, weight, symptoms. No endless forms.
landing.feature_coach_desc: Ask anything about your diet, hydration, injection site rotation. Answers in seconds.
landing.feature_privacy_desc: End-to-end encrypted. Export anytime. We don't sell data.
landing.disclaimer: This app is not a replacement for your doctor. We don't prescribe or sell medications.

coach.title: Coach
coach.placeholder: Ask me anything about your day with GLP-1
coach.empty_state_body: I'm here to keep you company. I'm not your doctor — that's what your doctor is for. But I am who gets it when it's 11pm and you're nauseous. Ask me anything.
coach.quota_exhausted: You used your free questions for today. Go Pro for unlimited.
coach.quota_exhausted_body: The free plan includes 3 questions per day. It resets tomorrow, or upgrade to Pro for unlimited.
coach.error_generic: Something didn't go through. Try again in a moment.
coach.error_rate_limit: Too many questions too fast. Wait a few seconds.
coach.disclaimer: Bukowski is not a doctor. For clinical questions or dose decisions, talk to your doctor.
coach.disclaimer_inline: I'm not a doctor. For dose changes or severe symptoms, talk to your doctor.
coach.example_1: What should I eat if I have nausea?
coach.example_2: I missed a dose, what do I do?
coach.example_3: How do I rotate injection sites?

canned.crisis:
What you're telling me matters. I want to make sure you're okay before we continue.

If you're in danger or having thoughts of hurting yourself, please reach out:
• US: 988 Suicide & Crisis Lifeline (press 2 for Spanish)
• Mexico: Línea de la Vida 800-290-0024 (24/7, free)
• Medical emergency: 911

Are you safe right now? I'm here.
canned.dose_advice: That's a decision between you and your doctor — I can't recommend doses. What we can do is prep your questions for your next appointment: what effects you've noticed, what you want to adjust, what you need to know. Want help with that?
canned.vendor_question: I can't recommend a specific vendor or pharmacy. To get GLP-1 safely there are two paths: a prescription from your doctor for the branded version (Ozempic, Wegovy, Mounjaro, Zepbound), or a licensed 503A compounding pharmacy in the US through telehealth. 'RUO' or 'research grade' products are not safe for human use and I'm not going to suggest them.
canned.reconstitution: Reconstituting and calculating peptide doses isn't something I can help with. That's work for a licensed pharmacist or your doctor. If you're considering a compounding pharmacy, make sure it's a US-licensed 503A and that they prep the product ready-to-inject.
canned.expired_med: Don't use expired medication. Potency and sterility aren't guaranteed anymore, and GLP-1s are sensitive to temperature and time. Talk to your pharmacist or doctor about a replacement. If you're using insurance, they sometimes make exceptions.
